name: tp-mcp
description: Principled MCP (Model Context Protocol) server skills — design (equilibrated recursivity, tool decomposition, pass-through, output contract, JSON-RPC error discipline, context budget, annotations, naming, capability negotiation, security), implement (rmcp + schemars + tokio, transport choice, stderr-only logging, error mapping, testing), and tool-surface authoring (JSON Schema 2020-12 constraints, additionalProperties:false discipline, discriminator enums, naming). Three skills covering the full MCP server lifecycle, plus the `claude-cli` skill in the existing `claude-cli-wrapper` plugin as a worked example of the 6-tool decomposition pattern.
